# atlassian_jira_screen_scheme (Data Source)

Use this data source to look up a Jira Cloud screen scheme by name.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "atlassian_jira_screen_scheme" "example" {
  name = "Default Screen Scheme"
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the screen scheme to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) The description of the screen scheme.
- `id` (String) The ID of the screen scheme.
- `screens` (Map of String) A map of issue operation names to screen IDs. Valid keys: "default", "create", "view", "edit".
